name: Holli Would... Wouldn't You?
author: Jonoland
bootlegger: The drunk Village Idiot might learn arbitrary information if a Vortox is in play.
If the Poppy Grower dies while drunk, poisoned or while a Vortox is in play, their ability functions as normal.
The Hermit registers as the Damsel to the Huntsman's ability and might be added during setup instead.
If a Damsel & Hermit are in play, Minions learn that a Damsel is in play only once and may guess a player with the Damsel ability only once.
If a player with the Ogre ability selects the 'Faux Paw', they learn their alignment.
